title: Zoro Gains New Blades
description: On pages 13–16, zoro gains new blades focuses on Zoro, Tashigi, Nami, Luffy as the crew reaches Loguetown, where Zoro searches for swords and runs into Tashigi.
scene: On pages 13–16, zoro gains new blades focuses on Zoro, Tashigi, Nami, Luffy as the crew reaches Loguetown, where Zoro searches for swords and runs into Tashigi.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Many famous swordsmen of the past have suffered tragic deaths after carrying around the Kitetsu swords.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: That's why you won't find any swordsmen who'd dare to use a kitetsu these days.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Even if a person was unaware of the curse behind these swords, they'd still end up dead after wielding one.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: I wish I could get rid of that damn sword,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: But I'm afraid of being cursed too...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: For- Give me!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I had no idea it was such a terrifying sword,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: and ended up saying some- thing so fool~ ish...

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Hmph!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is why amateurs like you,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Shouldn't act like they're experts about swords!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I like it!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: So much so that I'll take it!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Y-you idiot, I said it's not for sale! If I did sell it to you and you ended up dead, it'd be almost as if I were the one who killed you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't be stupid! Just sell the damn thing already!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Agh! But honey!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then how about this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why don't we test what's stronger?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My luck...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Or its curse...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...If I lose,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then that just means I was never a man who'd amount to anything special...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Stop! You'll lose your arm!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: That sword's sharp-ness is UNPAR- ALELED!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ahhhh...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'll take it!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Hey, you. Pick one more sword out for me.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: O-OK...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hang on!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Just...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wait right here!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: This is a black lacquered longword with an unravelled edge.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's name is "yubashiri," one of the so skillful-grade swords! I can personally attest to its sharpness!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Although my store may not be much,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: This is the best sword I have.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Haha... I can't buy this. I already told you I have no money.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm not asking for any money! Just take it!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: And of course, I won't ask you to pay for Sandai Kitetsu either.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I apologize for trying to trick you before.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's been a long time since I've seen a swordsman as good as you.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: As they say, the sword chooses its owner.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: So I shall also believe in your good luck and pray!

summary: This part gives Zoro a major equipment and character moment while Loguetown’s Marines begin to matter.
